content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 16, 2005

Michael Grant
Best Best & Krieger LLP
Lawyers
P.O. Box 1028
Riverside, CA 92502-1028

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-231

Dear Mr. Grant:

We are in receipt of your October 20, 2005, and November 8, 2005 letters regarding Al Schmidt, Chairman of Desert Hot Springs Planning Commission. Your correspondence do not constitute a request for written advice under Commission regulation 18329 (copy enclosed), therefore, the Commission we will be taking no action on your letters.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
